title: Hello from agent-radio-oss
summary: A short canned script for testing the renderer without an OpenRouter key. Three Kokoro hosts demo the cast.

segments.speaker: host_a
segments.text: This is Haystack News on agent-radio-oss. I'm Michael, and I'm a Kokoro voice running on whatever hardware you've got — CPU, an AMD GPU, an Apple Silicon Mac, or an NVIDIA card.

segments.speaker: host_b
segments.text: I'm Bella. We're not a real news show right now — this is the canned demo script that ships with the repo so you can test your install without an OpenRouter key.

segments.speaker: host_c
segments.text: And I'm Adam. The three of us cover the same Haystack News format the production stack uses — the difference is we're all Kokoro, and the whole pipeline is Apache 2.0.

segments.speaker: host_a
segments.text: If you can hear all three of us, the renderer is working. From here, point it at a real curator config to start producing daily AI news episodes on your own hardware.

segments.speaker: host_b
segments.text: That's it for the demo. Real Haystack News, on your hardware, in five minutes. Welcome to the station.
